message:
fix(net,grpc): wake evicted wakers + peer-review 12 agent commits

Fixes:
- Wake evicted waker instead of silently discarding when waker vec
  cap (32) is reached. Applied to tcp/listener, tcp/virtual_tcp,
  unix/listener, grpc/client. Prevents permanent lost wakeup under
  high concurrent accept/response load.
- GF2 column_pivot docstring: 'lowest' → 'highest' set bit to match
  implementation (correct for persistent homology).

Peer-reviewed agent commits (all SOUND):
- Weighted round-robin select_n (3 commits)
- Circuit breaker sliding window reset contradiction (resolved correctly)
- Redis PubSub interleaved message preservation
- DPOR queue dedup + topology frontier scoring
- Sleep set semantic keys
- LCG Fisher-Yates upper-bit extraction

Session total: 258 files audited. 11 bugs fixed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
